title: Consolidated Edison: Undervalued And Stabilizing The Business
text: I estimate ED's intrinsic value around $37.4B, or 108 per share - an 18% upside. Selling its clean energy business for $6.8B, allows Consolidated Edison to stabilize and revitalize the fundamentals. Dividends may not be covered by performance, but the company is moving in the right direction.
